case_title: DESOTO CAB CO. COOPERATIVE VS LANGENEGGER, V. MARGARITA et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO NEWSPAPER AGENCY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DESOTO CAB CO. COOPERATIVE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANGENEGGER, V. COPY OF JUDGMENT TO THE RISK MANAGEMENT DEPT. S.F. NEWSPAPER AGENCY SENT, AS REQUESTED.
